steps.t: The half-orc prisoner is held captive in the jail of Grimslade, which is behind the Mead Hall. You should speak with the half-orc prisoner.
The half-orc prisoner is held captive in the jail of Grimslade. Say <rgb=#FF0000>bye</rgb> and take your leave of the prisoner. <rgb=#F…
The half-orc prisoner is held captive in the jail of Grimslade. You should speak with the half-orc prisoner.
The half-orc prisoner is held captive in the jail of Grimslade. You should examine the cell of the prisoner for signs of maltreatment.
The half-orc prisoner is held captive in the jail of Grimslade. You should speak with the half-orc prisoner.
Men who can help ready the town can be found near the front gate of Grimslade. You should give orders to ready for an attack.
Hildith is in the Mead Hall of Grimslade. You should speak with Hildith.
